tagline: You can now add a SQL alert task to your Databricks jobs to evaluate Databricks SQL alerts as part of your workflows.
what_it_does: You can now add a SQL alert task to your Databricks jobs to evaluate Databricks SQL alerts as part of your workflows. SQL alert tasks enable automated condition checks and notifications within your data pipelines. Use a SQL alert task to evaluate a Databricks SQL alert as part of a job.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: You can now add a SQL alert task to your Databricks jobs to evaluate Databricks SQL alerts as part of your workflows. SQL alert tasks enable automated condition checks and notifications within your data pipelines.
key_takeaway: You can now add a SQL alert task to your Databricks jobs to evaluate Databricks SQL alerts as part of your workflows.
